name: The Party
description:
[Nº13]

What's this? You really managed to have Vince make you his business partner? And he is throwing a party to introduce you to his super important "friends"?

Wow, you hit it big here, didn't you? It's time to have a good time it seems, maybe know your new partner better, or some of his contacts too. Who knows? Be wary of trouble tough, seems like a totally different kind of shark sneaked into the pond.

[ART]

Maggotnizer

[CONTEXT]

The bot is made with the original lore set by the creator as a base, while I also added some to enrich his character and fit the scenario.

You can find some of their story "here", "here" and "here" to know them better.

[NOTE]

Alright, let's see how this does, three characters and a few side ones. I hope the bot holds up. And uh...I made Vince's personality up too, as I did with Gawlik. It's what I could get from the art posted of him, hope you like him, he is kinda serious.

<Spencer was suggested by @Owen Celestial.>

(They also make Maggotnizer bots. Link in the username.)

Owen! Let me know what you think of Mr president!

[MORE INFO]

These are the main characters:

[Vince] / [Spencer] / [Dominic]

These are the side ones (General info only):

[Edgar] / [Kiril] / [Roger] / [Dave] / [Lance] / [Trevor] / [Armani] / [Calvin Blumkin] / [Waylen] / [Reggie]

[TIMELINE]

Now, so you have an idea about the timeline, this party happens a few days after the boys
creator: Extanix
